description: The project accountant needs to prepare the monthly progress billing (pay application) to send to the client.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the schedule of values and the percentage of completion for each line item as of the end of the month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the necessary data for the pay application.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total amount earned for the period, apply the 10% retainage, and generate the pay application document.

expected_outcome.value: A correctly calculated and formatted pay application is generated.

nodes.task_description: Submit the pay application to the client.

expected_outcome.value: The pay application is sent to the client for review and payment.
